name: Kids Geometry
description: Description: Kids Geometry is an educational game designed to help children learn and recognize various geometric shapes in a fun and interactive way. Through colorful and engaging gameplay, kids will explore different shapes, understand their properties, and improve their spatial awareness. The game features multiple levels, each with increasing complexity, to keep young learners challenged and motivated. With vibrant graphics and playful sound effects, Kids Geometry makes learning about shapes an enjoyable adventure.
instructions: Desktop Mouse Controls Click on shapes or buttons to interact with them Touch Controls for touchscreen devices Select Tap on shapes or buttons to interact with them
tags: Baby Games, Best Games, Clicker, Educational, Geometry, Kid, Kids
